error.title: Something went wrong
error.fallback: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

error.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
error.network: A network error occurred. Check your connection and retry.
error.overloaded: The service is temporarily overloaded. Please try again shortly.
error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API configuration.
error.contextLength: The conversation is too long. Consider clearing the chat.
error.processError: The assistant process failed to start. Make sure Claude Code is installed and configured.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.cannotReachServer: Cannot reach the server. Make sure the backend is running: npm run dev:server

toast.runNotPermitted: Your role does not permit running workflows
toast.autosaveFailed: Couldn't autosave your changes — they may be lost on reload.

workflowGenerationFailed.title: Workflow generation failed
workflowGenerationFailed.description: Could not generate a multi-agent workflow. Creating a simple assistant instead. Check server logs for details.

workspaceCreateFailed.title: Could not create workspace
workspaceCreateFailed.description: The workspace could not be created. Make sure the server is running and try again.

discussionCreateFailed.title: Could not create discussion
discussionCreateFailed.description: Failed to save the discussion. Make sure the server is running.

importFailed.title: Import failed
importFailed.description: Could not import this canvas file.

import.tooLarge: This canvas file is too large to import (limit 16 MB).
import.invalidJson: That file is not valid JSON.

log.noAgents: No agents on the canvas. Add at least 2 connected agents to run a workflow.
log.connectTwoAgents: Connect at least 2 agents with edges to form a workflow chain.
log.agentSaveFailed: Agent "{{name}}" could not be saved to database. Please recreate it.
log.cannotConnectServer: Cannot connect to server. Make sure the backend is running on port 3001.
log.outputNoMatch: Output "{{name}}": no matching agent output to save
log.noStepHistory: No conversation history available for {{agentName}} yet.
log.emailNoMatch: Email "{{name}}": no matching agent output to send

banner.viewOnly: View-only access — editing and running are disabled

coaching.connectNodes: Connect assistants by dragging from one handle to another

agentChat.empty: Select an assistant to start chatting
